_README: CLOSED ATTESTED-LINEAGE ENUM (crit-5, HALT-for-human). This is the set of reviewer model LINEAGES that count as genuinely DISTINCT independent origins for G8 cross-lineage origin fusion (I3). Choosing it is a RESERVED HUMAN DECISION and must be committed BEFORE any cross-lineage origin is claimed — exactly like the pre-registered thresholds. Replace each '__PREREGISTER_LINEAGE_ENUM__' with real values: `lineages` = an array of at least two distinct, non-empty lineage names (e.g. ["claude", "gemini", "gpt", "grok"]); `committed_by` = who committed it; `committed_date` = an ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD). Until then G8 stays INERT and test/lineage-enum.test.mjs signals a HALT-for-human (a SKIP, so the suite stays GREEN). See bin/lineage-enum.mjs REQUIRED_FIELDS.
